_description: DAST scan suppression rules and alert thresholds. Edit this file to tune what the pipeline reports as FAIL vs. suppressed. Restart a scan to pick up changes (the file is baked into the overlay image).

falsePositives.reason: ArgoCD REST API endpoints intentionally omit Cache-Control — API clients must not cache by convention
OAuth authorize endpoint encodes the access_token in the redirect URI — this is per-spec and expected
Information disclosure via URL is expected for REST API path segments
ArgoCD session cookie lacks SameSite — known upstream limitation, tracked separately
Timestamp disclosure in API responses is not sensitive in this context
Modern web application heuristic does not apply to ArgoCD's REST API
Session management rule not applicable to token-based API authentication
